title: Charaka Samhita
note: Classical Ayurvedic source for dravya, diet, lifestyle, dosha, agni, and clinical reasoning traditions.

title: Sushruta Samhita
note: Classical Ayurvedic source with descriptions of substances, surgical tradition, pathology, and safety-oriented clinical judgment.

title: Ashtanga Hridaya
note: Classical compendium frequently referenced for dosha, agni, chikitsa principles, and common formulations.

title: Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia of India
note: Government pharmacopoeial monographs for identity, quality parameters, and selected Ayurvedic materia medica.

title: Ayurvedic Formulary of India
note: Government formulary reference for classical Ayurvedic formulations and composition standards.

title: CCRAS / Ministry of AYUSH Sources
note: Institutional educational and research materials from Indian government Ayurveda bodies.

title: WHO Herbal Medicine Safety Guidance
note: General safety guidance for herbal medicines, pharmacovigilance, quality, interactions, and consumer risk reduction.
